samples.xml_description:
<module id="adder_32bit">
    <description>Implement a 16-bit carry-lookahead adder that uses the carry-lookahead adder architecture.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="A" width_description="[32:1]">32-bit input operand A.</input>
        <input id="B" width_description="[32:1]">32-bit input operand B.</input>
        <output id="S" width_description="[32:1]">32-bit output representing the sum of A and B.</output>
        <output id="C32">Carry-out output.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>Each CLA block computes S and C32 in parallel using carry-lookahead logic, allowing for faster addition compared to a ripple-carry adder. The carry-out from each CLA block serves as the carry-in for the next block.</implementation>
</module>
